title: Align PRK_2e/PRK_3e2m/PRK_4e3m derivation chain and transcript binding in edhoc.rs with Python reference
description: Update comments and code in InitiatorState and ResponderState for PRK assignments (lines ~640-654, 1076-1082). Ensure TH_2 used as salt for HKDF-Extract(G_XY) produces matching PRKs. Fix any copy_from_slice or Zeroizing mismatches.
